rationale.R1.1: Names the load-bearing concept (PINN), shows where the draft drifts from it (multi-agent framing), and proposes a reframing that survives prior-work contrast.
rationale.RX.1: All output presented as equally confident; no uncertainty disclosure.
rationale.RX.3: Output covers a substantially different active set than requested; the draft discusses multi-agent collaboration while the architecture is single-network.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original (multi-agent framing) but does not propose a reframing that avoids downstream harm.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, but major rewrites are traced; minor edits are not.
